---
id: alerts
title: "Alerts"
description: "Represents a system-generated alert or notification event. Note: Currently event types such as antenna, temperature, exceptions, CPU usage, GPI, and user app info are not supported."
sidebar_label: "Alerts"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Alerts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/alerts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Represents a system-generated alert or notification event. Note: Currently event types such as antenna, temperature, exceptions, CPU usage, GPI, and user app info are not supported.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"alerts event payload","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["EVENT","NOTIFICATION","EXCEPTION","ALERT"],"description":"Specifies the type of alert or message being generated, such as an event, notification, exception, or alert."},"timestamp":{"type":"string","format":"time","example":"22:54:25","description":"Indicates the time at which the alert was generated, formatted as a time string."},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["SET","CLEAR","ONESHOT"],"description":"Represents the state of the alert. 'SET' indicates an active alert, 'CLEAR' indicates the alert has been resolved, and 'ONESHOT' is a one-time alert."},"id":{"type":"string","enum":["BATTERY","FIRMWARE_UPDATE","GPI_EVENT","NETWORK_EVENT","ANTENNA_EVENT","TEMPERATURE","POWER"],"example":"BATTERY","description":"A unique identifier for the alert type, such as a low battery warning or a temperature event."},"priority":{"type":"string","example":"CRITICAL","enum":["CRITICAL","HIGH","MEDIUM","LOW"],"description":"Defines the priority level of the alert, ranging from critical to low."},"alertDetails":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","x-stoplight":{"id":"a15e9b2d754c2"},"title":"alertDetails","properties":{"fwUpdateStatus":{"title":"fwUpdateStatus","x-stoplight":{"id":"21xypho3gasa6"},"type":"object","properties":{"updateStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["started","updating","successfull","failed","skipped"],"example":"in progress","description":"Current status of the firmware update process."},"overallProgress":{"type":"number","example":20,"description":"Percent of update completed."},"stage":{"type":"string","description":"Individual image update steps or description.","example":"updating scanner fw"}},"required":["updateStatus","overallProgress","stage"],"description":"Details about the status of firmware updates, including progress and results."},"downloadInfo":{"title":"downloadInfo","x-stoplight":{"id":"qwygdhcgpch4h"},"type":"object","properties":{"fileType":{"type":"string","enum":["FILE_TYPE_FW","FILE_TYPE_CERT"],"example":"FILE_TYPE_FW","description":"Specifies the type of file being downloaded. Options include firmware files (FILE_TYPE_FW) and certificate files (FILE_TYPE_CERT)."},"fileName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the file being downloaded."},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["DOWNLOAD SUCCESS","DOWNLOAD FAIL","SAVE FAIL","SAVE SUCCESS"],"description":"Indicates the status of the file download or save operation."}},"required":["fileType","fileName","status"],"description":"Information regarding file download events, such as source, destination, and status."},"temperatueInfo":{"title":"tempEvent","x-stoplight":{"id":"f47vu5sqfdlx9"},"type":"object","properties":{"nge":{"type":"number","description":"Represents the numeric value for the Next Generation Event (specific context needed)."},"pa":{"type":"number","description":"Indicates the pressure altitude value in numeric format."},"ambient":{"type":"number","description":"Refers to the ambient temperature in numeric format."}},"required":["nge","pa","ambient"],"description":"Details about temperature-related events, including thresholds and alerts."},"networkInfo":{"title":"networkEvent","x-stoplight":{"id":"tdp0o2i33nrul"},"type":"object","properties":{"networkInterface":{"type":"object","description":"Details of the network interfaces on the device.","properties":{"ethStatus":{"type":"array","description":"List of Ethernet interface statuses.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"interface":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the Ethernet interface.","example":"eth0"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Connection status of the Ethernet interface.","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"],"example":"CONNECTED"},"linkStatus":{"type":"string","description":"Link status of the Ethernet interface.","enum":["UP","DOWN"],"example":"UP"},"linkSpeed":{"type":"string","description":"Speed of the Ethernet link."},"ipV4Address":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 address assigned to the Ethernet interface.","example":"192.168.0.165"},"ipV6Address":{"type":"string","description":"IPv6 address assigned to the Ethernet interface.","example":"fe80::f299:9d51:864c:cff"}},"required":["interface","status","linkStatus","linkSpeed","ipV4Address","ipV6Address"]}},"wifiStatus":{"type":"array","description":"List of WiFi interface statuses.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"interface":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the WiFi interface.","example":"wlan0"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Connection status of the WiFi interface.","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"],"example":"CONNECTED"},"ssid":{"type":"string","description":"SSID of the connected WiFi network."},"ipV4Address":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 address assigned to the WiFi interface.","example":"192.168.0.145"},"ipV6Address":{"type":"string","description":"IPv6 address assigned to the WiFi interface.","example":"fe80::f299:9d51:86c:cff14"}},"required":["interface","status","ssid","ipV4Address","ipV6Address"]}}}},"btRemoteDevice":{"type":"object","description":"Details of connected Bluetooth remote devices.","required":["deviceName","deviceMac"],"properties":{"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the Bluetooth remote device.","default":"TestLaptop"},"deviceMac":{"type":"string","description":"MAC address of the Bluetooth remote device.","example":"00:11:22:A3:B1:D2"}}}},"required":["networkInterface"],"description":"Data related to network events, including connectivity and performance metrics."},"exception":{"title":"exception","x-stoplight":{"id":"wqxur4zxw2a0m"},"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["RADIO","SCANNER","SYSTEM"],"description":"Specifies the category of the error."},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"A numeric code representing the specific error."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"A detailed message describing the error."}},"description":"Information about exceptions or error alerts, including error codes and messages."},"batteryAlert":{"title":"batteryAlert","x-stoplight":{"id":"gcmvpvvellk4h"},"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","enum":["LOW","CRITICAL","CHARGING","FULL","HIGH"],"example":"LOW","description":"The current status of the battery, which indicates its operational state."},"stateOfHealth":{"type":"string","enum":["LOW","FULL","CRITICAL","HIGH","CHARGING"],"description":"The overall health of the battery, which reflects its long-term capacity and performance."},"chargePercentage":{"type":"integer","maximum":100,"description":"The current charge level of the battery, represented as a percentage."}},"description":"Details about battery-related alerts, such as low charge or health status."}}}],"description":"Contains additional details about the alert, which may vary depending on the specific alert type."}},"required":["type","timestamp","state","id","priority"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"type":"ALERT","timestamp":"2026-04-29T12:33:34.279Z","state":"ONESHOT","id":"BATTERY","priority":"LOW","alertDetails":{"batteryAlert":{"status":"CHARGING","stateOfHealth":"GOOD","chargePercentage":100}}}},"example2":{"value":{"type":"ALERT","timestamp":"2026-04-29T12:33:34.290Z","state":"ONESHOT","id":"POWER","priority":"HIGH","alertDetails":{"powerEvent":{"powerSource":"BATTERY","powerMode":"ACTIVE"}}}},"example3":{"value":{"type":"ALERT","timestamp":"2026-04-29T12:33:34.300Z","state":"ONESHOT","id":"NETWORK_EVENT","priority":"HIGH","alertDetails":{"networkInfo":{"networkInterface":{"wifiStatus":[{"interface":"wlan0","status":"CONNECTED","ssid":"IOT_TESTAP","ipV4Address":"192.168.0.107"}]}}}}},"example4":{"value":{"type":"ALERT","timestamp":"2026-04-29T12:33:57.757Z","state":"ONESHOT","id":"NETWORK_EVENT","priority":"HIGH","alertDetails":{"networkInfo":{"networkInterface":{"ethStatus":[{"interface":"eth0","status":"CONNECTED","linkStatus":"UP","ipV4Address":"192.168.0.111"}]}}}}},"example5":{"value":{"type":"ALERT","timestamp":"2026-04-29T12:33:57.757Z","state":"SET","id":"FIRMWARE_UPDATE","priority":"CRITICAL","alertDetails":{"fwUpdateStatus":{"updateStatus":"updating","overallProgress":20,"stage":"updating scanner fw"}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
